title: Mature Briny Spanish Cheddar Wrap
description: A Whole30-friendly, crowd-pleasing Spanish dish featuring mature cheddar, wrapped in a lotus leaf and cooked to perfection in a tandoor.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto the lotus leaves, making sure to cover the entire surface.
Place a slice of prosciutto on each lotus leaf, leaving a small border around the edges.
Add a few strips of mature cheddar cheese on top of the prosciutto.
Fold the lotus leaves over the filling to form a wrap, and secure with a toothpick if needed.
Place the wraps in the tandoor and cook for 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the lotus leaves are crispy.
Remove the wraps from the tandoor and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
